basic_details.job_title: Kerala University Women Attender Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kerala University Women Attender Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website keralauniversity.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Kerala University Women Attender Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 55 years Relaxation applicable for SC/ST/PWD candidates as per government rules

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Kerala University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kerala University recruitment is Women Attender. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Women Attender post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Women Attender post as per the official notification released by Kerala University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Women Attender post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Women Attender post is SSLC Pass.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Women Attender post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Women Attender post is between 30 years and 55 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PWD candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Women Attender position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Women Attender position will receive a salary of Rs. 21,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Women Attender post at Kerala University?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview with all necessary documents at the specified venue and time. No online application is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the date of the walk-in interview for the Women Attender recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Women Attender recruitment will be conducted on 03 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the Women Attender post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the Women Attender post for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Kerala University office in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with pincode 695034.
